titleStmt.title: SII 26.797: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 797. (A.R. No. 746 of 1909.) ŚAMAYAVARAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Muktīśvara temple.

p.hi: Tribhº Rājarājadēva III: Year 6, Mēsha (Chittirai), ba. 5, Wednesday, Mūlam = 1221 A.D. April 14. The tithi ended on the previous day at ·85 and the nakshatra ended at ·36.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of tax-free land to provide for foodofferings in the temple of the god Kaḻugiṟaināyaṉār of Māgāṇikuḍi (on the bank of the river) Kīḻpalāṟu in Pāchchil-kūṟṟam in Vaḍakarai-Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu by Neṟṟikkaṇ Mādaiyaṉ, one of the young sons (?) of Śrī-Vīraśōḻīśura dēvar of the place. (Vide No. 752 above).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu
6 vatu meṣanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu pañcamiyum putaṅkiḻamai peṟṟa mula
ttunāḷ vaṭakarai rājarājavaḷanāṭṭu pāccil kūṟṟattu kiḻpalāṟṟu mākāṇikuṭi U
ṭaiyār kaḻukiṟaiṉāyaṉāṟku koyil Iṉāyaṉāṟku tirukāppil tirumañcaṉam
Uṭaiyār kaḻukiṟaināyaṉārkku śrīviracoḻicuratevar ciṟuppiḷḷaikaḷil neṟṟikkaṇ mātayaṉ Iṉṉāyaṉā
tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa nilattu nāṭṭavarai Iṭa Iṟaiyili Iṭuvitta kār maṟunilam Orumāvarai
yuṅkoṇṭu 100 1kku tirumaṉtirapoṉakam Aḻutu ceytaruḷa tiruvamutarici nāṉāḻiyum kaṟiyamutu Uḷḷi
ṭṭa veñcaṉaṅkaḷum Āṟāvatu kār mutal cantirātittavarai celuttakkaṭavom tāṉattārom Itu śrīmāheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.797 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
